## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content status and plan for 2026 strategy recalibration.](https://fathom.video/share/D-Bts7mteht3YPaHQRxReXnLiG7AtNK-?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Holiday Content Secured:** 14 articles (7 refreshes, 7 new) are pre-written to maintain publishing cadence while Matt is OOO (Dec 19–Jan 4).](https://fathom.video/share/D-Bts7mteht3YPaHQRxReXnLiG7AtNK-?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)
  - [**2026 Strategy Recalibration:** January will focus on a full content audit to align with Imubit's new messaging, CMS, and positioning.](https://fathom.video/share/D-Bts7mteht3YPaHQRxReXnLiG7AtNK-?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [**New Content Focus:** The "Workforce Enablement" cluster will be a top priority, addressing themes like the "silver tsunami" and knowledge transfer.](https://fathom.video/share/D-Bts7mteht3YPaHQRxReXnLiG7AtNK-?tab=summary&timestamp=913.0)
  - [**Demand Gen Expansion:** Tara requested GrowthX repurpose top-of-funnel articles into mid-funnel guides to support Imubit's new demand gen funnel.](https://fathom.video/share/D-Bts7mteht3YPaHQRxReXnLiG7AtNK-?tab=summary&timestamp=1311.0)

## Topics

### Content Status & Holiday Plan

  - [**Last Week:** 7 articles published, including refreshes for Oil & Gas and Petro.](https://fathom.video/share/D-Bts7mteht3YPaHQRxReXnLiG7AtNK-?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)
  - [**This Week:** 3 refreshes will be shared tomorrow for publishing by Monday/Tuesday.](https://fathom.video/share/D-Bts7mteht3YPaHQRxReXnLiG7AtNK-?tab=summary&timestamp=335.0)
  - [**Next Week:** 7 net-new articles are written and ready for publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/D-Bts7mteht3YPaHQRxReXnLiG7AtNK-?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This pre-written batch ensures a consistent publishing cadence while Matt is OOO (Dec 19–Jan 4).](https://fathom.video/share/D-Bts7mteht3YPaHQRxReXnLiG7AtNK-?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)

### 2026 Strategy & Recalibration

  - [**January Focus:** A full content audit and strategy recalibration to align with Imubit's new messaging and CMS.](https://fathom.video/share/D-Bts7mteht3YPaHQRxReXnLiG7AtNK-?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [**New Messaging:**](https://fathom.video/share/D-Bts7mteht3YPaHQRxReXnLiG7AtNK-?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
      - [Tara is developing a new messaging framework, starting with a sales "story arc."](https://fathom.video/share/D-Bts7mteht3YPaHQRxReXnLiG7AtNK-?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
      - [**Goal:** Build an internal AI agent based on the final framework to ensure message consistency.](https://fathom.video/share/D-Bts7mteht3YPaHQRxReXnLiG7AtNK-?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
      - [**ICP Impact:** The Ideal Customer Profile (ICP) remains the same person, but the messaging will become sharper and more focused.](https://fathom.video/share/D-Bts7mteht3YPaHQRxReXnLiG7AtNK-?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
  - [**Content Roadmap:** The current roadmap is ending. The audit will inform a new roadmap for H1 2026, including refreshed keyword research and topic clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/D-Bts7mteht3YPaHQRxReXnLiG7AtNK-?tab=summary&timestamp=766.0)

### Performance & New Content Focus

  - [**Organic Traffic:** Sessions are healthy but need a steeper growth curve.](https://fathom.video/share/D-Bts7mteht3YPaHQRxReXnLiG7AtNK-?tab=summary&timestamp=857.0)
  - [**Cluster Performance:** The "Workforce Enablement" cluster is underrepresented and a key opportunity.](https://fathom.video/share/D-Bts7mteht3YPaHQRxReXnLiG7AtNK-?tab=summary&timestamp=909.0)
      - [**Rationale:** It addresses critical industry needs like the "silver tsunami" (retiring workforce) and knowledge transfer.](https://fathom.video/share/D-Bts7mteht3YPaHQRxReXnLiG7AtNK-?tab=summary&timestamp=953.0)
  - [**LLM Tracking:** GrowthX is tracking Imubit's appearance in LLM results (e.g., Perplexity, Google AI Overviews).](https://fathom.video/share/D-Bts7mteht3YPaHQRxReXnLiG7AtNK-?tab=summary&timestamp=1044.0)
      - [**Finding:** Imubit appears in Perplexity and Google AI Overviews but not in GPT or Anthropic for the prompt "How can AI-driven optimization contribute to measurable ROI...".](https://fathom.video/share/D-Bts7mteht3YPaHQRxReXnLiG7AtNK-?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)
      - [**Future:** GrowthX will launch its own LLM tracking tool in early Q1 to provide more granular insights.](https://fathom.video/share/D-Bts7mteht3YPaHQRxReXnLiG7AtNK-?tab=summary&timestamp=1136.0)

### Demand Gen Funnel & Service Expansion

  - [**Imubit's Funnel:** Tara is building a demand gen funnel:](https://fathom.video/share/D-Bts7mteht3YPaHQRxReXnLiG7AtNK-?tab=summary&timestamp=1398.0)
      - [**Top:** Cold articles (e.g., "Best practices for modeling in refining")](https://fathom.video/share/D-Bts7mteht3YPaHQRxReXnLiG7AtNK-?tab=summary&timestamp=1398.0)
      - [**Middle:** Guides → On-demand webinars](https://fathom.video/share/D-Bts7mteht3YPaHQRxReXnLiG7AtNK-?tab=summary&timestamp=1398.0)
      - [**Bottom:** Personalized demos](https://fathom.video/share/D-Bts7mteht3YPaHQRxReXnLiG7AtNK-?tab=summary&timestamp=1398.0)
  - [**Service Request:** Tara asked GrowthX to repurpose top-of-funnel articles into mid-funnel guides to support this funnel.](https://fathom.video/share/D-Bts7mteht3YPaHQRxReXnLiG7AtNK-?tab=summary&timestamp=1311.0)
  - [**Context:** A similar request was declined previously due to bandwidth constraints during a GrowthX reorg.](https://fathom.video/share/D-Bts7mteht3YPaHQRxReXnLiG7AtNK-?tab=summary&timestamp=1311.0)
  - [**Data Needs:** Matt requested client success metrics (e.g., ROI) to enrich the guides. Tara will investigate available data.](https://fathom.video/share/D-Bts7mteht3YPaHQRxReXnLiG7AtNK-?tab=summary&timestamp=1465.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Matt:** Share 3 refresh articles (this week) and 7 net-new articles (next week) for publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/D-Bts7mteht3YPaHQRxReXnLiG7AtNK-?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)
  - [**Matt:** Investigate GrowthX's capacity for content repurposing and report back in January.](https://fathom.video/share/D-Bts7mteht3YPaHQRxReXnLiG7AtNK-?tab=summary&timestamp=1569.0)
  - [**Tara:** Share the new sales "story arc" and any new external content (e.g., podcasts) as available.](https://fathom.video/share/D-Bts7mteht3YPaHQRxReXnLiG7AtNK-?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
  - [**Tara:** Investigate available client success metrics for use in mid-funnel guides.](https://fathom.video/share/D-Bts7mteht3YPaHQRxReXnLiG7AtNK-?tab=summary&timestamp=1465.0)
  - [**Both:** Schedule a strategy session for early January to conduct the content audit and plan the H1 2026 roadmap.](https://fathom.video/share/D-Bts7mteht3YPaHQRxReXnLiG7AtNK-?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
